---
title: "Talks and Workshops"
listing:
  contents:
    - "metadata.yml"
  type: grid
  date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
  fields: [date, title, event, recording, author, slides, extsite, repo]
  template: /talk/talk-listing.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  feed: true
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: /talk/talks.css
filters:
  - fontawesome
---

## Upcoming

### June 16 | R/Pharma GenAI Day | Virtual

Thinking about boosting your skills in (LLM) skills? Join us to learn more! [Register here](https://events.zoom.us/ev/AkKYQ7Uryr8k8HeuQ7F6rkZTHJwjHlP6gxu14Z2s1LYb0kswLdDT~ApU4J3CViJWrwmjZhnw0nwGzDFCxNGoMHJAw01NbG30yNwnVwf9IJQkvOg).

## Past

Subscribe to event recaps: <a href="https://ivelasq.rbind.io/talk.xml" target="_blank"><i class="fa-sharp fa-solid fa-rss"></i></a> {{< fa cat >}}
